fact: Virat Kohli became the fastest player to score 14,000 runs in One Day Internationals in 2025.
The ICC Champions Trophy returned in 2025 after an eight-year gap.
A Super Over is used to determine the winner if a limited-overs knockout match ends in a tie.
A cricket ball weighs between 155.9 and 163 grams according to ICC regulations.
The Marylebone Cricket Club (MCC) remains the guardian of the Laws of Cricket.
Jasprit Bumrah became the first Indian fast bowler to reach the number one position in all three international formats.
Brian Lara holds the highest individual score in first-class cricket with 501 not out.
The Women's Premier League (WPL) was launched in India in 2023.
A batsman is awarded six runs when the ball crosses the boundary without touching the ground.
Day-night Test matches are played using a pink cricket ball.
Lionel Messi won a record eighth Ballon d'Or award in 2023.
Kylian Mbappé scored a hat-trick in the 2022 FIFA World Cup final.
A football team consists of eleven players including one goalkeeper.
The circumference of a standard football is between 68 and 70 centimeters.
The UEFA European Championship is held every four years.
The International Football Association Board (IFAB) writes and maintains the Laws of the Game.
Cristiano Ronaldo is the highest goal scorer in men's international football.
Spain won UEFA Euro 2024 by defeating England in the final.
The Video Assistant Referee (VAR) system helps officials review key match decisions.
The first official FIFA Women's World Cup was held in China in 1991.
An Se-young of South Korea won the women's singles gold medal at the Paris 2024 Olympics.
Viktor Axelsen of Denmark won the men's singles gold medal at the Paris 2024 Olympics.
A shuttlecock has 16 feathers arranged in a circular pattern.
A badminton racket typically weighs between 70 and 95 grams.
The BWF World Championships are held annually except during Olympic years.
Badminton became an official Olympic sport at the 1992 Barcelona Games.
Lakshya Sen won a bronze medal at the 2021 BWF World Championships.
The Sudirman Cup is the world mixed team badminton championship.
Players change ends after every game and during the third game when a player reaches 11 points.
China has won more Sudirman Cup titles than any other nation.
